app.name: JW Field Companion
app.tagline: A calm, local-first workspace for ministry records.

delete.title: Delete profile
delete.description: This will permanently remove this profile's local data.

list.title: Available profiles on this machine
list.empty: No profiles exist yet. Create the first profile to continue.

language.title: Welcome, {{name}}
language.description: Choose the language you want to use in the app.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.description: Read and accept the terms before continuing.
terms.disclaimerBody: This application is independent and is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or approved by Jehovah's Witnesses or the Watch Tower Bible and Tract Society.
terms.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to enable the button.

theme.title: Appearance
theme.description: Choose how you want the app to look.

backup.title: Personal backup
backup.description: You can save your data to a folder of your choice in addition to the automatic system backup.
backup.note: System backup is always active. Configuring a personal folder gives you an additional backup you can access whenever you need it.

ready.title: All set
ready.description: This is the initial summary of your setup.

hero.title: Desktop shell ready for multi-profile, offline-first ministry workflows.
hero.description: This starter replaces the generic Vite page with a product-specific application shell, local design tokens, bundled typography, and the initial localization setup required by the specification.

items.scaffold: React + TypeScript scaffold integrated into the repository root.
items.structure: Folder structure prepared for components, pages, hooks, store, lib, types, and i18n.
items.i18n: English and neutral Spanish translation files added from day one.
items.tauri: Tauri desktop shell initialized with local build commands and SQLite plugin wiring.

sqlite.title: SQLite-ready desktop shell
sqlite.description: Tauri is configured and prepared to host local SQLite-backed flows for Phase 1.

i18n.title: Localization foundation
i18n.description: The app now boots with i18next and ships with English and neutral Spanish resources.

flows.title: Flow-oriented structure
flows.description: The repository is organized to grow around the issue sequence you defined for onboarding, persons, visits, studies, and sessions.

backup.title: Commercial-grade groundwork
backup.description: The initial shell already reflects the product's emphasis on clarity, safety, backups, and calm visual hierarchy.

database.title: Database bootstrap status
database.description: This panel shows whether the app could create and initialize the local SQLite schema for the current bootstrap profile.
database.tablesEmpty: No application tables were detected yet.
